title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: A video essay arguing that AGI predictions are overhyped and that transformer-based language models have fundamental mathematical ceilings rooted in computational complexity theory. The piece examines the Time Hierarchy Theorem, chain-of-thought limitations, error accumulation in autonomous agents, and claims about model accuracy bounds.
